title: Cambridge Apostles
body: The Cambridge Apostles (also known as the Conversazione Society) is or was an intellectual society at the University of Cambridge founded in 1820 by George Tomlinson, a Cambridge student who became the first Bishop of Gibraltar.
categories: Clubs and societies of the University of Cambridge
